RunSynchronousCommand.Path: cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:@echo off&echo:call :print ^"Setting keyboard layout for PE session^"&echo:wpeutil.exe SetKeyboardLayout 0409:00000409&echo:for ^%^%d in (C D E F G H I J K L M N O P Q T U V X Y Z^) do ()
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:if exist ^%^%d:\sources\install.wim set ^"IMAGE_FILE=^%^%d:\sources\install.wim^"&echo:if exist ^%^%d:\sources\install.esd set ^"IMAGE_FILE=^%^%d:\sources\install.esd^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:if exist ^%^%d:\sources\install.swm set ^"IMAGE_FILE=^%^%d:\sources\install.swm^" ^& set ^"SWM_PARAM=/SWMFile:^%^%d:\sources\install*.swm^"&echo:if exist ^%^%d:\autounattend.xml set ^"XML_FILE=^%^%d:\autounattend.xml^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:if exist ^%^%d:\$OEM$ set ^"OEM_FOLDER=^%^%d:\$OEM$^"&echo:if exist ^%^%d:\$WinPEDriver$ set ^"PEDRIVERS_FOLDER=^%^%d:\$WinPEDriver$^"&echo:if exist ^%^%d:\virtio-win-guest-tools.exe set ^"VIRTIO_DRIVE=^%^%d:^"&echo:^))
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:for /f ^"tokens=3^" ^%^%t in ('reg.exe query HKLM\System\Setup /v UnattendFile 2^^^>nul'^) do ( if exist ^%^%t set ^"XML_FILE=^%^%t^" ^))

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:if not defined IMAGE_FILE call :fail ^"Could not locate install.wim, install.esd or install.swm.^"&echo:if not defined XML_FILE call :fail ^"Could not locate autounattend.xml.^"&echo:set ^"OS_VERSION=11^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:for /f ^"tokens=3 delims=.^" ^%^%v in ('ver'^) do (&echo:if ^%^%v LSS 20000 set ^"OS_VERSION=10^"&echo:^)&echo:if defined PEDRIVERS_FOLDER (&echo:call :print ^"Loading drivers from $WinPEDriver$ folder^")
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:for /R ^%PEDRIVERS_FOLDER^% ^%^%f IN (*.inf^) do drvload.exe ^"^%^%f^"&echo:^)&echo:if defined VIRTIO_DRIVE (&echo:call :print ^"Loading VirtIO drivers^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:drvload.exe ^"^%VIRTIO_DRIVE^%\vioscsi\w^%OS_VERSION^%\^%PROCESSOR_ARCHITECTURE^%\vioscsi.inf^"&echo:drvload.exe ^"^%VIRTIO_DRIVE^%\NetKVM\w^%OS_VERSION^%\^%PROCESSOR_ARCHITECTURE^%\netkvm.inf^"&echo:^)&echo:^>X:\assert.vbs ()

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:Function Fail(message^^^)&echo:echo:WScript.Echo message&echo:echo:WScript.Quit 1&echo:echo:End Function&echo:echo:On Error Resume Next&echo:echo:Set wmi = GetObject(^^^"winmgmts:\\.\root\cimv2^^^"^^^))

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:Set drive = wmi.Get(^^^"Win32_DiskDrive.DeviceID='\\.\PHYSICALDRIVE0'^^^"^^^)&echo:echo:If Err.Number ^^^<^^^> 0 Then&echo:echo:Fail ^^^"Could not locate disk 0 (^^^" ^^^& Err.Description ^^^& ^^^"^^^).^^^")
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:End If&echo:echo:actual = CInt( drive.Size / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 ^^^)&echo:echo:expected = 100&echo:echo:If actual ^^^< expected Then)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:Fail ^^^"Size of disk 0 is expected to be at least ^^^" ^^^& expected ^^^& ^^^" GiB, but actually is ^^^" ^^^& actual ^^^& ^^^" GiB.^^^"&echo:echo:End If&echo:echo:actual = CInt( drive.Size / 1024 / 1024 / 1024 ^^^))

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:expected = 200&echo:echo:If actual ^^^> expected Then&echo:echo:Fail ^^^"Size of disk 0 is expected to be at most ^^^" ^^^& expected ^^^& ^^^" GiB, but actually is ^^^" ^^^& actual ^^^& ^^^" GiB.^^^"&echo:echo:End If)
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:actual = drive.Partitions&echo:echo:If actual ^^^> 0 Then&echo:echo:Fail ^^^"There are already ^^^" ^^^& actual ^^^& ^^^" partitions on disk 0.^^^"&echo:echo:End If)
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:WScript.Echo ^^^"Disk assertions were satisfied.^^^"&echo:echo:WScript.Quit 0&echo:^)&echo:call :print ^"Running disk assertions^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:cscript.exe //E:vbscript ^"X:\assert.vbs^" //Nologo ^|^| call :fail ^"Disk assertion failed. Windows Setup will halt to avoid potential data loss.^"&echo:^>X:\GPT.txt (&echo:echo:SELECT DISK=0&echo:echo:CLEAN)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:CONVERT GPT&echo:echo:CREATE PARTITION EFI SIZE=300&echo:echo:FORMAT QUICK FS=FAT32 LABEL=^^^"System^^^"&echo:echo:ASSIGN LETTER=S&echo:echo:CREATE PARTITION MSR SIZE=16&echo:echo:CREATE PARTITION PRIMARY)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:FORMAT QUICK FS=NTFS LABEL=^^^"Windows^^^"&echo:echo:ASSIGN LETTER=W&echo:^)&echo:^>X:\MBR.txt (&echo:echo:SELECT DISK=0&echo:echo:CLEAN&echo:echo:CREATE PARTITION PRIMARY SIZE=300)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:echo:FORMAT QUICK FS=NTFS LABEL=^^^"System^^^"&echo:echo:ASSIGN LETTER=S&echo:echo:ACTIVE&echo:echo:CREATE PARTITION PRIMARY&echo:echo:FORMAT QUICK FS=NTFS LABEL=^^^"Windows^^^"&echo:echo:ASSIGN LETTER=W&echo:^))

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:wpeutil.exe UpdateBootInfo&echo:for /f ^"tokens=3^" ^%^%t in ('reg.exe query HKLM\System\CurrentControlSet\Control /v PEFirmwareType'^) do (&echo:if ^%^%t == 0x1 (&echo:set ^"LAYOUT=MBR^"&echo:^) else if ^%^%t == 0x2 ()

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:set ^"LAYOUT=GPT^"&echo:^) else (&echo:call :fail ^"Unexpected value ^%^%t.^"&echo:^)&echo:^)&echo:call :print ^"The target disk will be configured with the ^%LAYOUT^% partition layout^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"diskpart will now partition and format your disk^"&echo:diskpart.exe /s X:\^%LAYOUT^%.txt ^|^| call :fail ^"diskpart.exe encountered an error.^"&echo:set ^"IMG_PARAM=/Name:^"Windows ^%OS_VERSION^% Pro^"^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"Applying Windows image to target disk^"&echo:dism.exe /Apply-Image /ImageFile:^%IMAGE_FILE^% ^%SWM_PARAM^% ^%IMG_PARAM^% /ApplyDir:W:\ /CheckIntegrity /Verify ^|^| call :fail ^"dism.exe encountered an error.^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"Making system partition bootable^"&echo:bcdboot.exe W:\Windows /s S: ^|^| call :fail ^"bcdboot.exe encountered an error.^"&echo:bcdedit.exe /set {fwbootmgr} bootsequence {bootmgr})

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:call :print ^"Deleting winre.wim file to avoid creation of recovery partition^"&echo:del W:\Windows\System32\Recovery\winre.wim&echo:call :print ^"Copying answer file to target disk^"&echo:mkdir W:\Windows\Panther)
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:copy ^%XML_FILE^% W:\Windows\Panther\unattend.xml&echo:if defined PEDRIVERS_FOLDER (&echo:call :print ^"Adding drivers from $WinPEDriver$ folder to new installation^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:dism.exe /Add-Driver /Image:W:\ /Driver:^"^%PEDRIVERS_FOLDER^%^" /Recurse&echo:^)&echo:if defined VIRTIO_DRIVE (&echo:call :print ^"Adding VirtIO drivers to new installation^")
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:dism.exe /Add-Driver /Image:W:\ /Driver:^"^%VIRTIO_DRIVE^%\vioscsi\w^%OS_VERSION^%\^%PROCESSOR_ARCHITECTURE^%\vioscsi.inf^")
cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:dism.exe /Add-Driver /Image:W:\ /Driver:^"^%VIRTIO_DRIVE^%\NetKVM\w^%OS_VERSION^%\^%PROCESSOR_ARCHITECTURE^%\netkvm.inf^"&echo:^)&echo:call :print ^"Setting time zone^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:dism.exe /Image:W:\ /Set-TimeZone:^"India Standard Time^"&echo:call :print ^"Setting device setup region to United States (GeoID 244^)^"&echo:reg.exe LOAD HKLM\mount W:\Windows\System32\config\SOFTWARE)

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:reg.exe ADD ^"HKLM\mount\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Control Panel\DeviceRegion^" /v DeviceRegion /t REG_DWORD /d 244 /f&echo:reg.exe UNLOAD HKLM\mount&echo:call :print ^"Computer will now reboot^")

cmd.exe /c >>X:\pe.cmd (echo:wpeutil.exe reboot&echo:goto :eof&echo::fail&echo:echo:&echo:echo:Fatal error: ^%~1&echo:echo:&echo:pause&echo:exit 1&echo::print&echo:echo:&echo:echo:*** ^%~1 ***&echo:echo:&echo:goto :eof)
cmd.exe /c "X:\pe.cmd"

powershell.exe -WindowStyle "Normal" -NoProfile -Command "$xml = [xml]::new(); $xml.Load('C:\Windows\Panther\unattend.xml'); $sb = [scriptblock]::Create( $xml.unattend.Extensions.ExtractScript ); Invoke-Command -ScriptBlock $sb -ArgumentList $xml;"
powershell.exe -WindowStyle "Normal" -ExecutionPolicy "Unrestricted" -NoProfile -File "C:\Windows\Setup\Scripts\Specialize.ps1"
reg.exe load "HKU\DefaultUser" "C:\Users\Default\NTUSER.DAT"
powershell.exe -WindowStyle "Normal" -ExecutionPolicy "Unrestricted" -NoProfile -File "C:\Windows\Setup\Scripts\DefaultUser.ps1"
reg.exe unload "HKU\DefaultUser"

SynchronousCommand.Description: Download and Configure BGInfo for Desktop Info
SynchronousCommand.CommandLine: powershell.exe -NoProfile -WindowStyle Hidden -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$dir = 'C:\ProgramData\BGInfo'; New-Item -Path $dir -ItemType Directory -Force; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri 'https://live.sysinternals.com/Bginfo64.exe' -OutFile '$dir\Bginfo64.exe'; Set-ItemProperty -Path 'HKLM:\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Windows\CurrentVersion\Run' -Name 'BGInfo' -Value 'C:\ProgramData\BGInfo\Bginfo64.exe /Timer:0 /silent /nolicprompt'; Start-Process '$dir\Bginfo64.exe' -ArgumentList '/Timer:0', '/silent', '/nolicprompt'"

SynchronousCommand.Description: Download and Install VS Code System-Wide
SynchronousCommand.CommandLine: powershell.exe -NoProfile -WindowStyle Hidden -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "$url = 'https://code.visualstudio.com/sha/download?build=stable&os=win32-x64'; $path = \"$env:TEMP\vscode_setup.exe\"; Invoke-WebRequest -Uri $url -OutFile $path; Start-Process $path -ArgumentList '/VERYSILENT', '/NORESTART', '/MERGETASKS=!runcode' -Wait; Remove-Item $path"
shutdown /r /t 15 /c "Restarting in 15 seconds to finish installing Hyper-V..."
